untranslatable_reason: This signal is an options strategy (call spreads with specific expiration management) that cannot be translated into price/indicator conditions. It requires: (1) options chain data (nearest-term, intermediate-term, longest-term calls), (2) strike selection logic, (3) precise expiration date tracking, and (4) multi-leg position management. The allowed indicators are equity price/technical analysis only and do not support options greeks, volatility term structure, or expiration mechanics.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_91 is a calendar spread strategy (selling near-term calls against longer-term calls). While the regime is RANGING, the core logic involves options Greeks, implied volatility, time decay, and strike selection—none of which can be expressed through the available price and technical indicators. A backtest engine would need options-specific data structures and Greeks calculations to properly implement this strategy.
